title: Builders FirstSource: A Leader Ideally Positioned To Benefit From U.S. Housing Shortage
text: Builders FirstSource is a leading supplier of building materials and construction services in the US, operating in 42 states with over 550 locations. The US is experiencing a housing shortage of 5.5 million homes, creating a strong demand for building materials and construction services. BLDR has strong capital allocation, attractive valuation, and a track record of profitability, making it an attractive investment opportunity.

title: Builders FirstSource (BLDR) Q2 Earnings & Sales Beat, Shares Up

title: Builders FirstSource (BLDR) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Builders FirstSource (BLDR) came out with quarterly earnings of $3.89 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.69 per share. This compares to earnings of $6.26 per share a year ago.

title: Builders FirstSource Reports Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: IRVING, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Builders FirstSource, Inc. (NYSE: BLDR) today reported its results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2023. Second Quarter 2023 Highlights All Year-Over-Year Comparisons Unless Otherwise Noted: Net sales of $4.5 billion, a 34.6% decrease driven by a decline in core organic net sales of 22.3% and commodity deflation of 16.2%, partially offset by acquisitions of 3.9%. Gross profit margin percentage increased 40 basis points to 35.2% due to stronger mix in value-.
